PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner WHERE {
  wd:Q4431525 wdt:P155 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P582 ?endDate .
  ?season wdt:P1319 ?winner .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?endDate)
LIMIT 1
